title: calophyllum undulatum
intro: Calophyllum undulatum, also known as the Camphor Laurel or Lemon-scented Gum, is a large evergreen tree native to the coastal regions of eastern Australia. The medicinal properties of the Calophyllum undulatum plant are attributed to its essential oil, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight against bacterial and fungal infections, and act as a natural insect repellent. The herbal preparations of the Calophyllum undulatum plant include its use in essential oil form, as well as in capsule or tablet form, to provide relief from colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
